message.content:
Scan the filesystem at /home/mega for all ingestable text files (NOT already in /tmp/remaining_md_files.txt which was the previous manifest). Find .md, .txt, .json, .html files in these specific directories:
- /home/mega/Downloads/chatgptdata/
- /home/mega/Downloads/perplexity-exports/
- /home/mega/Downloads/SafaData/
- /home/mega/Downloads/claudedata/
- /home/mega/Downloads/Claude_files/
- /home/mega/Downloads/chatgpt-harvest-2026/
- /home/mega/Downloads/MEGA/ (skip bin/, venv dirs, node_modules)
- /home/mega/Downloads/Documents/
- /home/mega/Downloads/RY_Corpus_Final_Artifacts/
- /home/mega/Downloads/J•A•S•I/
- /home/mega/Documents/ (loose .md files only, NOT Documents/RY_Sovereign_Biography which was already ingested)
- /home/mega/Downloads/AI Research Papers_files/

Rules:
- Skip files over 5MB
- Skip binary/media files (.deb, .zip, .tar.gz, .m4a, .mp4, .jpg, .png, .gif, .pdf)
- Skip node_modules, .git, venv, __pycache__ directories
- Output all found file paths to /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt (one per line)
- Print a summary of how many files found per directory

Use Bash commands to find and filter. Write the output file when done.

content.text: I'll scan all the specified directories systematically, filter by rules, and build the manifest.
Now I'll write a comprehensive find script and run it.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/scan_ingest.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

MANIFEST=/tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt
EXISTING=/tmp/remaining_md_files.txt
MAX_SIZE=5242880  # 5MB in bytes

# Load existing manifest into a set for exclusion
declare -A existing_files
while IFS= read -r line; do
    existing_files["$line"]=1
done < "$EXISTING"

> "$MANIFEST"

declare -A dir_counts

scan_dir() {
    local dir="$1"
    local label="$2"
    local extra_prune="${3:-}"

    if [ ! -d "$dir" ]; then
        echo "  SKIP (not found): $dir"
        return
    fi

    local count=0
    # Build prune expression
    local prune_expr='\( -name node_modules -o -name .git -o -name venv -o -name __pycache__ -o -name bin -o -name .venv \)'
    if [ -n "$extra_prune" ]; then
        prune_expr="\( -name node_modules -o -name .git -o -name venv -o -name __pycache__ -o -name bin -o -name .venv -o -path \"$extra_prune\" \)"
    fi

    while IFS= read -r -d $'\0' f; do
        # Skip if in existing manifest
        [ "${existing_files[$f]+_}" ] && continue
        # Skip binary/media extensions
        case "${f,,}" in
            *.deb|*.zip|*.tar.gz|*.m4a|*.mp4|*.jpg|*.jpeg|*.png|*.gif|*.pdf|*.tar|*.gz|*.bz2|*.xz|*.iso|*.dmg|*.exe|*.bin|*.so|*.pyc|*.pkl|*.db|*.sqlite|*.sqlite3|*.woff|*.woff2|*.ttf|*.otf|*.eot|*.ico|*.svg|*.webp|*.mp3|*.ogg|*.wav|*.avi|*.mov|*.mkv|*.flac|*.parquet|*.npy|*.npz|*.h5|*.hdf5|*.mat|*.pkl.gz)
                continue ;;
        esac
        # Check size
        size=$(stat -c%s "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
        [ "$size" -gt "$MAX_SIZE" ] && continue
        echo "$f" >> "$MANIFEST"
        ((count++))
    done < <(eval "find \"$dir\" $prune_expr -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.md' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.html' \) -print0" 2>/dev/null)

    dir_counts["$label"]=$count
    echo "  $label: $count files"
}

echo "=== Scanning directories ==="

scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/chatgptdata" "chatgptdata"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/perplexity-exports" "perplexity-exports"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/SafaData" "SafaData"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/claudedata" "claudedata"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/Claude_files" "Claude_files"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/chatgpt-harvest-2026" "chatgpt-harvest-2026"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/MEGA" "MEGA"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/Documents" "Documents"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/RY_Corpus_Final_Artifacts" "RY_Corpus_Final_Artifacts"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/J•A•S•I" "J•A•S•I"
scan_dir "/home/mega/Downloads/AI Research Papers_files" "AI_Research_Papers_files"

# Documents/ loose .md files only, NOT Documents/RY_Sovereign_Biography
echo "--- Scanning /home/mega/Documents (loose .md only, skipping RY_Sovereign_Biography) ---"
if [ -d "/home/mega/Documents" ]; then
    count=0
    while IFS= read -r -d $'\0' f; do
        [ "${existing_files[$f]+_}" ] && continue
        case "${f,,}" in
            *.deb|*.zip|*.tar.gz|*.m4a|*.mp4|*.jpg|*.jpeg|*.png|*.gif|*.pdf|*.tar|*.gz|*.bz2|*.xz|*.iso|*.dmg|*.exe|*.bin|*.so|*.pyc)
                continue ;;
        esac
        size=$(stat -c%s "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
        [ "$size" -gt "$MAX_SIZE" ] && continue
        echo "$f" >> "$MANIFEST"
        ((count++))
    done < <(find /home/mega/Documents \
        \( -name node_modules -o -name .git -o -name venv -o -name __pycache__ -o -path "*/RY_Sovereign_Biography*" \) -prune \
        -o -type f -name '*.md' -print0 2>/dev/null)
    dir_counts["Documents_loose_md"]=$count
    echo "  Documents (loose .md): $count files"
fi

total=$(wc -l < "$MANIFEST")
echo ""
echo "=== TOTAL FILES IN NEW MANIFEST: $total ==="
echo "Manifest written to: $MANIFEST"
SCRIPT
chmod +x /tmp/scan_ingest.sh
bash /tmp/scan_ingest.sh
input.description: Run the full directory scan with all filters applied

input.command:
# Verify the manifest looks sane - check for any duplicates and sample entries
wc -l /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt
sort /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt | uniq -d | wc -l  # duplicate count
echo "--- Sample entries by dir ---"
for dir in chatgptdata perplexity-exports SafaData claudedata Claude_files MEGA Documents RY_Corpus_Final_Artifacts; do
    echo "== $dir =="
    grep "Downloads/$dir" /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt | head -3
done
echo "== J•A•S•I =="
grep "J•A•S•I" /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt | head -3
echo "== Documents loose md =="
grep "/home/mega/Documents/" /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt | head -5
echo "== AI Research Papers =="
grep "AI Research" /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt | head -3

content.text:
The scan is complete with no duplicates. Here is the summary:

**Files found per directory (written to `/tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt`):**

| Directory | Files |
|---|---|
| Downloads/chatgptdata/ | 17 |
| Downloads/perplexity-exports/ | 1 |
| Downloads/SafaData/ | 6 |
| Downloads/claudedata/ | 2 |
| Downloads/Claude_files/ | 4 |
| Downloads/chatgpt-harvest-2026/ | 0 |
| Downloads/MEGA/ | 1,956 |
| Downloads/Documents/ | 18 |
| Downloads/RY_Corpus_Final_Artifacts/ | 1 |
| Downloads/J•A•S•I/ | 27 |
| Downloads/AI Research Papers_files/ | 3 |
| /home/mega/Documents/ (loose .md only) | 5 |
| **TOTAL** | **2,040** |

Key notes:
- Zero duplicates with the existing `/tmp/remaining_md_files.txt` manifest
- The bulk (1,956 files) is in `Downloads/MEGA/` which contains the cloud-synced archive
- `chatgpt-harvest-2026/` directory either doesn't exist or had no matching text files
- `Downloads/Documents/` entries came through as `MEGA/Downloads/Documents/` paths (they live inside the MEGA sync tree)
- `/home/mega/Documents/RY_Sovereign_Biography` was excluded as instructed; 5 loose `.md` files from `/home/mega/Documents/` are included
